title: [IOS]Onboarding - Organized page has a continue button
scenario: Onboarding flow shows Poly Lens Login screen after tapping Skip on Organized page instead of skipping login
steps: On the onboarding screen, accept the License and Privacy terms
Tap Skip on the onboarding flow
Tap the 'Continue' button on the 'Organized' page
expected: After tapping Continue on the 'Organized' page, the Poly Lens Login screen should be displayed with 'Login' and 'Continue as Guest' options.
